dict.string: Anna controls apps like Safari, Music, and Finder on your behalf when you ask it to perform actions that require automation.
Anna creates and reads calendar events when you ask, like "add a meeting at 3pm" or "what's on my schedule today."
Anna looks up contacts when you ask, like "call Mom" or "text John."
Anna checks your Focus status so it knows when not to interrupt you.
Anna listens while you hold Right Command to transcribe voice commands, and while you hold Right Option to dictate text into any app.
Anna creates reminders and alarms for you when you ask, like "set an alarm for 7am" or "remind me to call Mom."
Anna captures your screen so it can see what you're looking at and give you visual guidance, like pointing to buttons or menu items.
Anna uses on-device speech recognition to transcribe your voice commands and dictation privately on your Mac.
